# Fawarisone Technologies

> Fawarisone Technologies is a leading web development and digital marketing company in India, founded in 2014. We help startups, SMBs, and enterprises grow online with AI-powered SEO, PPC, website design, eCommerce development, social media marketing, and branding services.

## About Us

Fawarisone Technologies is based in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India. We specialize in building high-performance websites and executing data-driven digital marketing strategies that deliver measurable results.

- Founded: 2014
- Location: 5th Floor, Silicon Towers, Sector 63, Noida, UP 201301, India
- Phone: +91-9540003620, +91-9540003236
- Email: FawarisOneTechnologies@gmail.com
- Website: https://fawarisone.com

## Services

- Web Development: Custom websites, eCommerce, WordPress, landing pages, mobile apps
- SEO Services: On-page SEO, technical SEO, local SEO, eCommerce SEO, keyword ranking
- PPC Advertising: Google Ads, Meta Ads, Instagram Ads, Bing Ads, performance marketing
- Social Media Marketing: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, organic and paid campaigns
- Branding: Logo design, brand identity, brand strategy, graphic design
- Content Writing: SEO content, blog writing, website copywriting, product descriptions
- Digital Transformation: UI/UX design, DevOps, cloud services, IT consulting
